languages.text: Whenever the Overseer makes a successful attack against this creature, the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g} cyber-mastiff makes a free melee attack against it, dealing −50% less damage. If this creature tries to move away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff gains a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel this creature's movement. If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's turn, spending 0 MP) and attacks it.

traits.locale_text: While the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}Apprehending{/g} Mastiff is near the Apprehended enemy, it makes a free melee attack against them each time the Overseer hits that enemy. It’s triggered by both melee and ranged attacks and also corresponding abilities. If the Apprehended enemy tries to retreat, the Mastiff makes a special melee attack that has a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel their movement.

languages.text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} makes a successful attack against this creature, the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g} cyber-mastiff makes a free {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against it, dealing −50% less damage. If this creature tries to move away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff gains a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel this creature's movement. If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, spending 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}) and attacks it.

If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, spending 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}) and attacks it.

languages.text: Когда надзиратель совершает успешную атаку против этого существа, кибермастиф, выполняющий {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}захват{/g}, атакует его вне лимита атак на {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, нанося урон, уменьшенный на 50%. Если это существо пытается отойти от кибермастифа, тот может прервать его движение с шансом {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}%. Если оно отдалилось от кибермастифа более чем на 1 клетку, тот следует за ним (в ход существа без затрат {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g}) и атакует его.

If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's turn, spending 0 MP) and attacks it.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}, bu yaratığa başarılı bir saldırı gerçekleştirdiğinde {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}göz hapsine alan{/g} siber mastif, yaratığa %50 daha az hasar veren serbest bir {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırısı{/g} yapar. Yaratık, siber mastiften uzaklaşmaya kalkarsa siber mastif, %{uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575} olasılıkla bu yaratığın hareketini iptal edebilir. Yaratık, siber mastiften 1 hücreden fazla uzaklaşırsa siber mastif, bu yaratığı takip ederek (yaratığın {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} sırasında 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} harcayarak) ona saldırır.
languages.original_text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} makes a successful attack against this creature, the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g} cyber-mastiff makes a free {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against it, dealing −50% less damage. If this creature tries to move away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff gains a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel this creature's movement. If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, spending 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}) and attacks it.

traits.locale_text: Gözetmen, bu yaratığa başarılı bir saldırı gerçekleştirdiğinde {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}göz hapsine alan{/g} siber mastif, yaratığa %50 daha az hasar veren serbest bir yakın dövüş saldırısı yapar. Yaratık, siber mastiften uzaklaşmaya kalkarsa siber mastif, %{uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575} olasılıkla bu yaratığın hareketini iptal edebilir. Yaratık, siber mastiften 1 hücreden fazla uzaklaşırsa siber mastif, bu yaratığı takip ederek (yaratığın turu sırasında 0 HP harcayarak) ona saldırır.

{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}, bu yaratığa başarılı bir saldırı gerçekleştirdiğinde {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}göz hapsine alan{/g} siber mastif, yaratığa %50 daha az hasar veren serbest bir yakın dövüş saldırısı yapar. Yaratık, siber mastiften uzaklaşmaya kalkarsa siber mastif, %{uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575} olasılıkla bu yaratığın hareketini iptal edebilir. Yaratık, siber mastiften 1 hücreden fazla uzaklaşırsa siber mastif, bu yaratığı takip ederek (yaratığın {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} sırasında 0 HP harcayarak) ona saldırır.

languages.text: Cuando el {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g} realiza un ataque con éxito contra esta criatura, el cibermastín que la tiene {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apresada{/g} efectúa un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataque cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} gratuito contra ella, infligiendo un −50 % menos de daño. Si esta criatura intenta alejarse del cibermastín, este tiene una probabilidad del {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575} % de anular el movimiento de esta criatura. Si la criatura se aleja más de 1 casilla del cibermastín, este la sigue (durante el {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} de esta criatura, gastando 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g}) y la ataca.
languages.original_text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} makes a successful attack against this creature, the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g} cyber-mastiff makes a free {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against it, dealing −50% less damage. If this creature tries to move away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff gains a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel this creature's movement. If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, spending 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}) and attacks it.

traits.locale_text: Cuando el supervisor realiza un ataque con éxito contra esta criatura, el cibermastín que la tiene {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apresada{/g} efectúa un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo gratuito contra ella, infligiendo un −50 % menos de daño. Si esta criatura intenta alejarse del cibermastín, este tiene una probabilidad del {uip|Chance|078bea05041540fa87a53b93d639f243} % de anular el movimiento de esta criatura. Si la criatura se aleja más de 1 casilla del cibermastín, este la sigue (durante el turno de esta criatura, gastando 0 PM) y la ataca.

languages.text: 每当{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}命中此单位时，{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}实施逮捕{/g}的生化獒犬也会立刻进行一次无消耗的{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}，造成的伤害降低50%。如果此单位试图远离生化獒犬，生化獒犬有{uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}%的几率阻止此单位移动。如果此单位向远处移动，与生化獒犬之间的距离超过1格，生化獒犬会自动跟随此单位（在此单位的{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内移动，不消耗{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}），同时进行攻击。
languages.original_text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} makes a successful attack against this creature, the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g} cyber-mastiff makes a free {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against it, dealing −50% less damage. If this creature tries to move away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff gains a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel this creature's movement. If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, spending 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}) and attacks it.

traits.locale_text: 每当监察官命中此单位时，{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}实施逮捕{/g}的生化獒犬也会立刻进行一次无消耗的近战攻击，造成的伤害降低50%。如果此单位试图远离生化獒犬，生化獒犬有{uip|Chance|078bea05041540fa87a53b93d639f243}%的几率阻止此单位移动。如果此单位向远处移动，与生化獒犬之间的距离超过1格，生化獒犬会自动跟随此单位（在此单位的回合内移动，不消耗移动点数），同时进行攻击。

languages.text: Wann immer der {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufseher{/g} einen erfolgreichen Angriff gegen diese Kreatur durchführt, führt der das {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}fassende{/g} Cyber-Mastiff einen freien {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriff{/g} durch, der −50 % weniger Schaden verursacht. Falls diese Kreatur versucht, sich von dem Cyber-Mastiff wegzubewegen, erhält der Cyber-Mastiff eine Chance von {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575} %, die Bewegung der Kreatur abzubrechen. Wenn sich die Kreatur weiter als 1 Feld von dem Cyber-Mastiff entfernt, folgt ihr der Cyber-Mastiff (während des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zugs{/g} der Kreatur, ohne {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g} zu verbrauchen) und greift sie an.
languages.original_text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} makes a successful attack against this creature, the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g} cyber-mastiff makes a free {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against it, dealing −50% less damage. If this creature tries to move away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff gains a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel this creature's movement. If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, spending 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}) and attacks it.

traits.locale_text: Wann immer der Aufseher einen erfolgreichen Angriff gegen diese Kreatur durchführt, führt der das {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}fassende{/g} Cyber-Mastiff einen freien Nahkampfangriff durch, der −50 % weniger Schaden verursacht. Falls diese Kreatur versucht, sich von dem Cyber-Mastiff wegzubewegen, erhält der Cyber-Mastiff eine Chance von {uip|Chance|078bea05041540fa87a53b93d639f243} %, die Bewegung der Kreatur abzubrechen. Wenn sich die Kreatur weiter als 1 Feld von dem Cyber-Mastiff entfernt, folgt ihr der Cyber-Mastiff (während des Zugs der Kreatur, ohne BP zu verbrauchen) und greift sie an.

languages.text: Chaque fois que le {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g} touche cette créature, le cyber-mastiff en mode {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}Appréhension{/g} exécute une {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaque de mêlée{/g} gratuite lui infligeant -50 % de dégâts. Si la créature tente de s'éloigner du cyber-mastiff, il gagne {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575} % de chances d'annuler son déplacement. Si la créature s'éloigne de plus de 1 case du cyber-mastiff, il la suit immédiatement sans dépenser de {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} et l'attaque.{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}{/g}
languages.original_text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} makes a successful attack against this creature, the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g} cyber-mastiff makes a free {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against it, dealing −50% less damage. If this creature tries to move away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff gains a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel this creature's movement. If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, spending 0 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}) and attacks it.

traits.locale_text: Chaque fois que le surveillant touche cette créature, le cyber-mastiff en mode {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}Appréhension{/g} exécute une attaque de mêlée gratuite lui infligeant -50 % de dégâts. Si la créature tente de s'éloigner du cyber-mastiff, il gagne {uip|Chance|078bea05041540fa87a53b93d639f243} % de chances d'annuler son déplacement. Si la créature s'éloigne de plus de 1 case du cyber-mastiff, il la suit immédiatement sans dépenser de PD et l'attaque.

languages.text: この生物に対して監督者が攻撃を成功させると、{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}捕縛している{/g}サイバーマスチフは、生物に対して自由な近接攻撃を行い、ダメージは−50%となる。この生物がサイバーマスチフから離れようとすると、サイバーマスチフは{uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}%の確率でこの生物の移動をキャンセルできる。生物がサイバーマスチフから1セル以上離れて移動すると、サイバーマスチフはそれに付いていき（この生物のターンの間消費MPは0）、攻撃する。
languages.original_text: Whenever the Overseer makes a successful attack against this creature, the {g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}apprehending{/g} cyber-mastiff makes a free melee attack against it, dealing −50% less damage. If this creature tries to move away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff gains a {uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}% chance to cancel this creature's movement. If the creature moves further than 1 cell away from the cyber-mastiff, the cyber-mastiff follows (during this creature's turn, spending 0 MP) and attacks it.

traits.locale_text: この生物に対して監督者が攻撃を成功させると、{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}捕縛している{/g}サイバーマスチフは、生物に対して自由な近接攻撃を行い、ダメージは−50%となる。この生物がサイバーマスチフから離れようとすると、サイバーマスチフは{uip|Chance|078bea05041540fa87a53b93d639f243}%の確率でこの生物の移動をキャンセルできる。生物がサイバーマスチフから1セル以上離れて移動すると、サイバーマスチフはそれに付いていき（この生物のターンの間消費MPは0）、攻撃する。

この生物に対して監督者が攻撃を成功させると、{g|f:e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}捕縛している{/g}サイバーマスチフは、生物に対して自由な近接攻撃を行い、ダメージは−50%となる。この生物がサイバーマスチフから離れようとすると、サイバーマスチフは{uip|StopChance|e16934c3dbf44cb997c684a6ddce7575}%の確率でこの生物の移動をキャンセルできる。生物がサイバーマスチフから1セル以上離れて移動すると、サイバーマスチフはそれに付いていき（この生物のターンの間消費MPは0）、攻撃する。
